affected_pattern: Customer first-bill after contract renewal shows charges at legacy rate card
root_cause: Contract renewal not published to rating — the renewed contract was approved in CRM but the 'publish-to-rating' webhook failed silently, leaving rating on the legacy (higher) rate card.
supporting_evidence: SLA Breach RCA Playbook: Contract Publish Webhook Failure pattern
CRM shows contract version v4 but rating engine is still on v3
Webhook dead-letter queue has entries for the affected account
recommended_action: Replay the webhook to publish contract v4
Rerate and refund the excess to the new contract floor
Add an alert on non-zero webhook DLQ
Introduce a rating-vs-CRM version drift dashboard
